name: Areca Palm
description: A tropical indoor plant with lush green fronds, perfect for brightening up living spaces and purifying air.

name: Sansevieria Plant
description: Also known as the Snake Plant, it's one of the easiest houseplants to care for. Thrives in low light.

name: Dracaena Plant
description: An elegant plant with long, glossy leaves. Ideal for homes and offices needing a touch of greenery.

name: Phalaenopsis Orchid
description: A graceful flowering plant with vibrant blooms. Best placed in bright, indirect sunlight.

name: Big Bonsai Plant
description: A beautifully shaped bonsai that adds a sense of tranquility and elegance to any room.

name: Anthurium Plant
description: Famous for its heart-shaped leaves and red flowers. A stunning addition to indoor plant collections.

name: Azalea Plant
description: A bright and bushy flowering plant, perfect for adding color to windowsills and balconies.

name: Hydrangea Plant
description: Known for its large, colorful flower clusters. A charming plant for both indoor and outdoor settings.

name: Baby Rose Plant
description: Delicate miniature roses that bring classic beauty and a sweet scent to any corner of your home.

name: Kalanchoe Plant
description: A succulent plant with colorful blooms. Very easy to care for and great for gifting.

name: Mini Bonsai Plant
description: A small and elegant bonsai perfect for tabletops and shelves. A true symbol of peace and patience.

name: Olive Plant
description: A Mediterranean classic with silvery leaves and symbolic meaning. A hardy indoor ornamental plant.

name: Lucky Bamboo
description: Considered a symbol of luck and good fortune. Easy to grow in water or soil with minimal light.

name: Croton Plant
description: A colorful foliage plant with bright variegated leaves. A striking choice for bold interior decoration.

name: Spider Plant
description: One of the most popular houseplants. Known for its air-purifying qualities and cascading leaves.

name: Ficus Lyrata
description: Also known as the Fiddle Leaf Fig, this stylish plant adds drama with its large violin-shaped leaves.
